{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163445AA9394BB58579E03D54E"}"},"total":1336},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7059339013693375270","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"应该是我看的西游同人里最精彩的一本了，男主虽然有两个妻子，但是全程几乎没得感情戏，结婚二百多年持续性两地分居，虽然有点多管闲事还偏心的不得了，但是并不突兀，让人觉得似乎就应该是这样的。
作者很棒，＾０＾~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643630448,"group_id":"6987676337750150181","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"戒掉一切使我长肉肉的饮料。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz+36kREBZjiPk3wgJiY+sE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/ddd9f80da6514f24a1b0c1decbf110f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790880&x-signature=4ttAa%2FP5HbBVBqc80vwa1rRKZas%3D","user_id":"98308220301","user_name":"戒可乐戒雪碧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98308220301","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6987676337750150181","book_info":{"abstract":"【已有百万字完本老书，质量保证】
穿越到西游世界怎么破？
穿越成渣渣妖王怎么破？
穿越成南山隐豹怎么破？
幸好我有气运本源傍身！
陈远：哎？不对劲儿啊！
我一个堂堂大妖王竟然要给唐僧端茶倒水？
黑风洞，唐僧：大王，您不吃贫僧？
白虎岭，唐僧：大王，您要放我走？
通天河，唐僧：大王，您怎么又给贫僧送饭来了？
金兜洞，唐僧：大王，怎么又是你？
隐雾山折岳连环洞，唐僧：悟空，这个妖怪不对劲儿啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6df139b5b36611dc72f0ec0e74d1875a","author":"我吃大肉串","author_id":"","book_id":"6987676337750150181","book_name":"西游之这个妖怪不对劲儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4337人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6989960475240825351","read_count":"4337","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1175252"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"550","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/51ae063aea355c2f53719abca555c520~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438885&x-signature=vPprAnXpMpER0MUcx82Iw8smuxQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.17638e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163445AA9394BB58579E03D54E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51763,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":33204},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7068647069279847202","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书还是有点料的，作者功底也不错，不是小白文…各种逻辑都不错，关键世界观清晰…
结尾鸿钧没赢，感觉草草收场滴感觉。
后记 时间已经回到现代，如果能把现实世界跟重启前洪荒世界清晰的对比一下就好了。
最后一句但凡能让我连着熬夜看的书都不赖。
然后最最关键的是也不加一句 “从此王子跟公主们过上了幸福美满的生活”。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1645797651,"group_id":"6987676337750150181","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"微微一笑耶个熊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/BLkMv6ueUN+f6/qRyuYauwL8ioWtycsRsoh9EFcy5Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/27a06c1c085b4b5eabdf6a962e62925f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791853&x-signature=egiQbxBHTuOXEIy3zEsTpXamhLo%3D","user_id":"3865506725510948","user_name":"何言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3865506725510948","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736112301,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6987676337750150181","book_info":{"abstract":"【已有百万字完本老书，质量保证】
